package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceall() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.Replace(..., -1)` instead of `bytes.ReplaceAll(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
